title: encelia heterophylla
intro: Encelia heterophylla, also known as California bush sunflower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections. Encelia heterophylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
